task_completion.description: Create the 'LoyaltyTiers' vertex class with required properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio schema view or console output showing the creation of a 'LoyaltyTiers' vertex class with 'TierName' (String), 'MinSpend' (Double), and 'Benefits' (String) properties.

task_completion.description: Populate the 'LoyaltyTiers' class with the four specified tiers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Database query results or Browse view showing four records in the 'LoyaltyTiers' class: Platinum, Gold, Silver, and Bronze, with their respective MinSpend and Benefits.

task_completion.description: Create the 'BelongsToTier' edge class and add a 'LoyaltyTier' property to the 'Profiles' class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Schema view or query execution confirming the creation of the 'BelongsToTier' edge class and the addition of a 'LoyaltyTier' (String) property to the existing 'Profiles' class.

task_completion.description: Classify profiles based on spend and update their 'LoyaltyTier' property.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results or database view showing 'Profiles' records with the 'LoyaltyTier' property populated (e.g., assigned to 'Bronze' due to 0 spend).

task_completion.description: Create 'BelongsToTier' edges connecting Profiles to their assigned LoyaltyTiers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Graph view or query results showing 'BelongsToTier' edges successfully linking 'Profiles' vertices to the corresponding 'LoyaltyTiers' vertices.

task_completion.description: Save a summary report to '/home/ga/loyalty_report.txt' with tier counts and Platinum member names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window or text editor showing the contents of '/home/ga/loyalty_report.txt', which must include the count of members per tier and a list of Platinum members (which may be empty).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OrientDB database to perform the classification.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using OrientDB Studio (web interface), the OrientDB console, or a script to execute queries, rather than just writing a text file.

integrity.description: The agent calculated the tiers dynamically rather than hardcoding expected results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used SQL/Gremlin queries or a script containing the traversal logic (Profile <- HasProfile - Customer - HasOrder -> Order) to calculate spend, rather than manually updating profiles.

integrity.description: The summary report was generated based on actual database query results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report file '/home/ga/loyalty_report.txt' reflects the actual state of the database (e.g., showing 0 Platinum members due to the missing edges), rather than a fabricated list of names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Database: demodb. Credentials: root / GymAnything123!. Report path: /home/ga/loyalty_report.txt. Tier thresholds: Platinum>=3000, Gold>=1500, Silver>=500, Bronze<500. CRITICAL NOTE: The provided database has a missing edge issue ('HasOrder' edges are missing). Consequently, all profiles will calculate 0 order spending. A correct execution will classify all profiles as Bronze, and the final report will show 0 Platinum members. Do not penalize the agent for finding no Platinum members; this is the correct result based on the database state.
